issues.description: STILL WRONG after supposed fix. THREE errors: (1) Path: vllm/v1/config/scheduler.py → correct is vllm/config/scheduler.py (no /v1/). Directory vllm/v1/config/ does not exist in the source submodule. (2) Line range: L70-L84 does not contain max_num_scheduled_tokens (at L56) or max_num_seqs (at L63). L70 is max_num_partial_prefills. (3) Defaults: chapter claims max_num_scheduled_tokens: int = 2048 but actual default is int | None = None (computed at runtime); claims max_num_seqs: int = 256 but actual uses Field(default=DEFAULT_MAX_NUM_SEQS). Fix: reference vllm/config/scheduler.py with correct lines (L56, L63, L84) and correct defaults.
